meta.metaDescription: Portfolio of Panyakorn Boonyong, a Bangkok-based frontend and full-stack developer focused on React, Next.js, TypeScript, AI integrations, and secure product experiences.
meta.openGraphDescription: React, Next.js, TypeScript, AI integrations, secure product flows, and production web applications.

hero.heroTitle: Building polished web products with React, Next.js, and AI workflows.
hero.heroText: I’m Panyakorn Boonyong, a frontend-focused web developer with 5+ years of experience building production applications, financial and exchange-style flows, authentication, KYC, wallet experiences, and AI-integrated product features.
hero.heroNote: Available for frontend, full-stack, and AI-enabled product teams.
hero.focusedText: Production frontend architecture, AI product integrations, secure user flows, and reusable UI systems.

sections.aboutTitle: Frontend craft with product, security, and AI context.
sections.aboutText: I work across product requirements, API integration, frontend architecture, and production support. My strongest fit is a team that needs someone who can own complex web flows end-to-end: from typed data fetching and state management to reusable UI systems and user-facing polish.
principles: Ship production-ready interfaces that work across desktop and mobile.
Build secure user journeys around auth, KYC, wallet, and transaction flows.
Turn APIs into typed, reusable frontend data layers and UI patterns.
Use AI tools pragmatically to automate workflows and accelerate product delivery.
sections.workTitle: Private project experience, written as portfolio-safe case studies.
sections.workText: These highlights avoid confidential project names while still showing the scope, responsibilities, and technical depth behind the shipped work.

featuredWork.title: Exchange-style web experience
featuredWork.description: Frontend modules for market pages, trading and convert journeys, dashboard, wallet, deposit, withdrawal, fiat and OTC flows, and transaction history.
bullets: Authentication-aware routing with access and refresh-token handling plus protected pages.
KYC, email verification, 2FA checks, OTP requests, withdrawal pre-checks, and confirmation modals.
Thai and English structure using Next.js App Router and i18n routing patterns.

featuredWork.title: AI-enabled web application console
featuredWork.description: Feature modules for chatbot configuration, knowledge management, workflow management, meetings, billing-related screens, and team-owned product areas.
bullets: Typed data layers with React Query, query-key factories, mutation hooks, and SDK clients.
Auth0 authentication and real-time updates through SSE and WebSocket integrations.
Shared UI components inside a pnpm and Turborepo monorepo with strict TypeScript boundaries.

featuredWork.title: Bilingual storefront and automation flows
featuredWork.description: Commerce and reseller features covering product catalog, cart, checkout and payment, customer accounts, flash sales, commission logic, and CMS-driven content.
bullets: Built account, checkout, payment, and reseller or commission user journeys.
Created mobile deep-link previews, store fallback, and Open Graph sharing infrastructure.
Self-hosted n8n with Docker to connect LLM outputs into downstream workflow steps.

sections.skillsTitle: Modern frontend systems with pragmatic AI workflows.
sections.skillsText: The stack is broad, but the through-line is consistent: clear architecture, reliable delivery, and interfaces that stay maintainable after launch.

skills.list: React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, responsive UI
React Query, Redux, RTK Query, Zustand, Context API, Axios, REST APIs
Tailwind CSS, Ant Design, Material UI, Radix UI, Bootstrap, Styled-components
Claude API, OpenAI API, prompt design, n8n workflow automation, AI-assisted development
Node.js, Golang, PHP / WordPress, Directus, JSON APIs
Git, Docker, pnpm, Turborepo, Vitest, Biome, Postman, Swagger, JIRA, Confluence

sections.timeline: Mar 2021 – Present · Bangkok, Thailand · Promoted from Junior Web Developer
experienceBullets: Develop and maintain production web applications with React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, RESTful APIs, and responsive UI patterns across desktop and mobile experiences.
Build features from API integration through state management, validation, error handling, and reusable UI components using Redux, Zustand, React Query, Tailwind CSS, Material UI, and Ant Design.
Integrate LLM APIs and AI-assisted workflows including Claude and OpenAI API usage, prompt and data-flow design, n8n automation, and AI-assisted development tools.
sections.chatTitle: A chat workspace is already staged for the AI agent layer.
sections.chatText: This demo UI is intentionally local-first: the conversation flow, prompt composer, and quick actions are in place now, so the next step is wiring your chosen AI API without redesigning the experience.
sections.contactTitle: Let’s build useful, secure, and polished web products.
sections.contactText: Open to frontend, full-stack, AI integration, and product-focused web development opportunities.
roadmap: Add a custom domain after Vercel deployment.
Replace confidential placeholders with approved screenshots or sanitized mockups.
Add measurable impact metrics such as performance, conversion, or delivery speed.

shared.intro: These pages describe the terms and privacy practices for this portfolio website and its contact flows.

directory.title: Official Terms and Privacy links, ready to submit.
directory.text: Use these permanent URLs for platform setup, app review forms, and public legal references.
directory.termsHelp: Link to your app or website's official Terms of Service
directory.privacyHelp: Link to your app or website's official privacy policy
directory.validationMessage: Please fill out the required field

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Terms of Service for Panyakorn Boonyong's portfolio website.
terms.intro: By accessing this website, you agree to use it lawfully and only for evaluating portfolio work, contacting the owner, or reviewing public information about services and experience.

sections.heading: Use of the website
body: You may browse the website, review project summaries, and use the listed contact channels for legitimate business or professional communication.
You must not misuse the website, attempt unauthorized access, interfere with availability, or use automated scraping in a way that harms the service.

sections.heading: Content and intellectual property
body: All portfolio content, writing, layouts, visuals, and code samples remain the property of Panyakorn Boonyong unless another owner is clearly stated.
Case studies may be summarized or sanitized to protect confidential employer or client information.

sections.heading: No guarantee
body: The website is provided on an as-is basis. While reasonable effort is made to keep information accurate and current, no guarantee is made that all content is complete, error-free, or continuously available.

sections.heading: External links
body: This website may link to third-party services such as GitHub, LinkedIn, LINE, or hosted documents. Those services are governed by their own terms and privacy policies.

sections.heading: Contact and updates
body: These terms may be updated from time to time as the website evolves. Continued use of the website after updates means you accept the revised terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Privacy Policy for Panyakorn Boonyong's portfolio website.
privacy.intro: This website collects only the information needed to operate the portfolio, respond to inquiries, and understand basic site usage.

sections.heading: Information collected
body: If you contact the owner by email, LinkedIn, LINE, or another listed channel, the information you provide in that message may be received and stored by the relevant communication platform.
Basic technical data such as browser, device, and page access logs may be collected by the hosting provider for security, analytics, and reliability.

sections.heading: How information is used
body: Information is used to respond to messages, discuss work opportunities, maintain website security, and improve the portfolio experience.

sections.heading: Sharing
body: Personal information is not sold. Information may be processed by infrastructure providers such as hosting, analytics, email, or messaging platforms when needed to operate the website or respond to you.

sections.heading: Retention and security
body: Reasonable steps are taken to protect information, but no online system can guarantee absolute security. Messages and operational logs may be retained for as long as reasonably necessary for communication, record-keeping, or legal compliance.

sections.heading: Your choices
body: You can choose not to submit personal information by avoiding contact forms or direct outreach. If you want previously shared information removed where feasible, you can request that through the listed contact channels.

chat.introTitle: Built to swap in a real model later.
chat.introText: This widget is framed as Panyakorn's AI presence: a portfolio guide that speaks in first person about experience, projects, stack, and collaboration style. The responses are still mocked for now, but the conversation shape is ready for a real model.
quickPrompts: Summarize my frontend experience for a recruiter.
Draft a short intro message for a potential client.
Turn my portfolio into a concise project pitch.
chat.inputPlaceholder: Type a prompt to simulate the future portfolio agent...
chat.emptyState: Hi, I'm Panyakorn's AI portfolio guide. You can ask me about his frontend experience, AI integrations, product thinking, or the kind of team he wants to build with.
chat.apiNote: This is still a mocked reply, but if I answered as Panyakorn's AI assistant, I'd say:

starterConversation.text: Hi, I'm Panyakorn's AI portfolio guide. I can walk you through his frontend background, product work, and AI integration experience.
What kind of work is he strongest at?

He’s strongest in React, Next.js, and TypeScript projects where the product has real complexity: auth, KYC, wallet flows, dashboards, data-heavy UI, and AI-enabled features that need to feel polished in production.
Would he fit a team building an AI product?

Yes. He already works across frontend architecture, API integration, workflow automation, and AI-assisted product features, so he can help both with the user-facing experience and with integrating the model layer into a real app.

mockReplies.intro: I focus on frontend and full-stack product work, especially React, Next.js, TypeScript, secure user flows, and AI-enabled features. Most of my recent work has involved shipping real production interfaces rather than just prototypes.
mockReplies.work: A good snapshot of my work would be exchange-style product flows, AI application consoles, and bilingual commerce experiences. I usually contribute across UI architecture, API integration, state handling, and the final product polish.
mockReplies.skills: My strongest stack is React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, and frontend data patterns like React Query. I also work comfortably with AI APIs, workflow automation, auth flows, and reusable design systems.
mockReplies.contact: If you'd like to work together, the best next step is to send a short message about your product, team, or role. I’m most useful in teams that need someone who can turn complex product requirements into clear, production-ready web experiences.
mockReplies.default: Ask me about experience, featured projects, tech stack, or how I usually work with product teams.

contactForm.title: Send a project note directly from the site.
contactForm.description: This form now posts into the portfolio backend, stores the inquiry in PostgreSQL, and can optionally forward it to a webhook for follow-up workflows.
contactForm.subjectPlaceholder: What would you like to build?
contactForm.messagePlaceholder: Share the product, role, timeline, or problem you want help with.
contactForm.storageNote: Stored through the portfolio backend API
contactForm.submitSuccess: Thanks, your message has been saved and sent successfully.
contactForm.submitError: The message could not be sent yet. Please check the form or try again shortly.
